article_title: Bylaw 14836 — Housing Agreement (5227 Lane St) Bylaw 2024, Repeal Bylaw 2026

minutes_briefs.title: Burnaby repeals housing agreement for 5227 Lane St — no new rules for owners
minutes_briefs.summary: The City of Burnaby has passed Bylaw 14836, which repeals an old housing agreement (a legal contract that set rules for a specific property) at 5227 Lane Street. This means the previous restrictions on that property are gone. No new housing agreement replaces it. This change only affects the one address — 5227 Lane St — not any other property in Burnaby.
